    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    L

    lastAttackTime - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Timestamp of last attack used for attack-speed cooldown checks.
    lastFrameTime - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Last timestamp at which animation frame changed.
    lastShotTime - Variable in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Timestamp of last successful shot.
    lastShotTime - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Timestamp of last shot.
    leftKey - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Key binding for moving left.
    lifeStealMultiplier - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Current life-steal multiplier.
    loadCharacterImage(String) - Method in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Loads the portrait image for a character.
